steps: Register with relevant professional body if required.
Most IT roles do not require formal recognition.
Check EU Blue Card salary thresholds.
Some regulated IT security roles may need additional certification.
Verify employer requirements; most tech roles are not regulated.
Contact CORU or NMBI for your profession.
Contact the national regulator for your healthcare profession.
Check Central Bank authorisation for regulated roles.
CFA/ACCA may be recognised by employers directly.
Confirm licensing requirements with local financial regulator.
Gather certified translations of your credentials.
